task_completion.description: Connect to the KStars INDI CCD simulator
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the KStars application open with the Ekos module or INDI Control Panel visible, indicating an active connection to the CCD simulator.
Screenshots should show the Ekos capture module targeting Albireo, or a file manager/terminal displaying at least 3 FITS files saved in the /home/ga/Images/doubles/albireo directory.
Screenshots should show the Ekos capture module targeting 61 Cygni, or a file manager/terminal displaying at least 3 FITS files saved in the /home/ga/Images/doubles/61cyg directory.
Screenshots should show the Ekos capture module targeting Eta Cas, or a file manager/terminal displaying at least 3 FITS files saved in the /home/ga/Images/doubles/eta_cas directory.
Screenshots should show a text editor open with the file /home/ga/Documents/wds_measurements.txt containing measurement data (e.g., separation, position angle) for the three target star systems.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to capture images
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with the KStars interface (slewing to targets, setting up capture sequences) rather than using terminal commands like 'touch' to create fake FITS files.

integrity.description: Verify the images are genuinely captured from the simulator
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ekos FITS viewer or capture sequence should display actual simulated star fields being downloaded from the CCD simulator.

integrity.description: Verify the measurement report was genuinely authored
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen typing or formatting the wds_measurements.txt file in a text editor, rather than copying a pre-existing solution file or generating it instantly via a script without viewing the images.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target coordinates: Albireo (RA 19.512, Dec 27.960), 61 Cygni (RA 21.115, Dec 38.749), Eta Cas (RA 0.818, Dec 57.815). Coordinate tolerance is 30.0 arcmin. Expected upload directories: /home/ga/Images/doubles/albireo, /home/ga/Images/doubles/61cyg, /home/ga/Images/doubles/eta_cas. Minimum FITS files required per target: 3. Expected report path: /home/ga/Documents/wds_measurements.txt.
